name: 1password
description: Manage secrets via the 1Password CLI (op): read, create, and inject credentials through op:// references so other skills get least-privilege access without exposing values.

interface.shortDescription: Manage secrets via the 1Password CLI (op): read, create, and inject credentials through op:// references so other skills get least-privilege access without exposing values.
interface.longDescription: Retrieve and inject secrets with op, keeping only op:// references on disk and never displaying secret values.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me use 1Password Secret Management safely.
